direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product. please make sure lenses are reflecting its correct environment.
- Clean studio portrait of a Filipino male model wearing DuberyMNL sunglasses, 3/4 angle, soft gradient backdrop — same framing and lighting mood as the reference, swapped to a DuberyMNL SKU with the brand logo visible on the temple.
- Lenses will reflect a plausible studio environment (soft key light + muted backdrop tones), not outdoor scenery, since the scene itself is indoor studio.
- Defaulting to black polo wardrobe, neutral cool-gray backdrop, and DuberyMNL brand font for any text overlays — product pick left to the pipeline's default rotation unless you specify.

Hit Generate when ready.
lets not add any overlay and keep it clean. okay?
- Clean studio portrait of a Filipino male model wearing DuberyMNL sunglasses, same 3/4 angle and soft gradient backdrop as the reference — no text, no logo overlay, no graphic elements.
- Lenses reflect a plausible indoor studio environment (soft key light, muted backdrop tones) — no outdoor scenery baked in.
- Defaulting to black polo, cool-gray backdrop, natural skin tones, product pick from the standard DuberyMNL rotation unless you specify.

Hit Generate when ready.
